heading: Violations; punishment
label: 37 Violations; punishment
text: Whoever knowingly commits, instigates, or assists in any act forbidden by shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and shall be fined not more than $5,000, or imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.section 34 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Submarine Cable Act which comprises this chapter.
